+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "rook: Support for arbitrary PersistentVolumes as backing storage",
+    "description": "Support for arbitrary PersistentVolumes as backing storage. Requested by 12+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current rook deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your rook version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nhelm list -n rook 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working rook installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review rook configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant rook configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nkubectl get configmap -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=rook\n```\nTo run more smoothly in various cloud providers, the OSDs should be able to run on top of arbitrary volumes. Persisted config folders for mons and osds should also use the same volumes, which is related to #796."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support for arbitrary PersistentVolumes as backing storage",
+        "description": "Description of your changes:  Update the Rook Roadmap as per community discussion\n```yaml\nsh-4.2# ceph osd tree\nID  CLASS WEIGHT  TYPE NAME                        STATUS REWEIGHT PRI-AFF\n -1       2.92676 root default\n -5       2.92676     region us-west-2\n -4       0.97559         zone us-west-2a\n -3       0.97559             host ip-10-0-140-53\n  0   ssd 0.97559                 osd.0                up  1.00000 1.00000\n-14       0.97559         zone us-west-2b\n-13       0.97559             host ip-10-0-152-238\n  1   ssd 0.97559                 osd.1                up  1.00000 1.00000\n-10       0.97559         zone us-west-2c\n -9       0.97559             host ip-10-0-167-50\n  2   \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nkubectl get events -n rook --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support for arbitrary PersistentVolumes as backing storage\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Description of your changes:  Update the Rook Roadmap as per community discussion",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "sh-4.2# ceph osd tree\nID  CLASS WEIGHT  TYPE NAME                        STATUS REWEIGHT PRI-AFF\n -1       2.92676 root default\n -5       2.92676     region us-west-2\n -4       0.97559         zone us-west-2a\n -3       0.97559             host ip-10-0-140-53\n  0   ssd 0.97559                 osd.0                up  1.00000 1.00000\n-14       0.97559         zone us-west-2b\n-13       0.97559             host ip-10-0-152-238\n  1   ssd 0.97559                 osd.1                up  1.00000 1.00000\n-10       0.97559         zone us-west-2c\n -9       0.97559             host ip-10-0-167-50\n  2   ssd 0.97559                 osd.2                up  1.00000 1.00000",
+        "sh-4.2# ceph osd tree\nID  CLASS WEIGHT  TYPE NAME                        STATUS REWEIGHT PRI-AFF\n -1       2.92676 root default\n -5       2.92676     region us-west-2\n -4       0.97559         zone us-west-2a\n  0   ssd 0.97559                 osd.0                up  1.00000 1.00000\n-14       0.97559         zone us-west-2b\n  1   ssd 0.97559                 osd.1                up  1.00000 1.00000\n-10       0.97559         zone us-west-2c\n  2   ssd 0.97559                 osd.2                up  1.00000 1.00000",
+        "$ kubectl -n rook-ceph describe pod rook-ceph-mon-a-6879fbf645-kc92c\n...\nVolumes:\n  ...\n  rook-ceph-log:\n    Type:          HostPath (bare host directory volume)\n    Path:          rook-ceph/log\n...\n  Warning  Failed          13s                kubelet            Error: failed to generate container \"15d1a7c1c4693a36e8043c198e77193a5844862bb5194aa17887729ea233000f\" spec: failed to generate spec: failed to mkdir \"rook-ceph/log\": mkdir rook-ceph: read-only file system"
+      ]
+    }
